_comment: Sqwod Evidence topic backlog. The weekly scheduled task pulls the first item with status 'pending', writes the EN+DE draft pair, then sets status 'drafted' with the slug + date. Add new topics to the end anytime. Keep ~8+ pending so the engine never runs dry.
